title: cyclosorus terrestris
intro: Cyclosorus terrestris, also known as the Rock Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Rock Fern has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus terrestris is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
